Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` with a non-integer argument.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that checks the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `toFixed` with a non-integer argument, specifically `1.1`, results in the string `"0.0"`. This test ensures that the `toFixed` method correctly handles non-integer input by rounding it to the nearest integer, which is a part of its expected functionality. The assertion is used to confirm that the method behaves as specified in the JavaScript language standard.
